full_text:
S255 pOme

Saundarya Sha performed tissue mincing and putting in 20 ml of Dispase and DNase according to the protocol.

Ashwini Nagaraj performed processing into final pellet followed by plating into 384 well plate.

Aditi Sirsikar performed 48 well plating and flow cytometry staining.

Final pellet was resuspended in 1 ml of the culture medium

Cell count /ml

1). Total cells: 3.1 x 106 /mL

Live cells: 1.2 x 106 /mL

Viability: 38.5%

Average size: 7.7 um

2). Total cells: 3 x 106 /mL

Live cells: 1.2 x 106 /mL

Viability: 39.4%

Average size: 7.6 um

Average of two counts: 3 x 106 /mL

Total cell count: 3 x 106 /3ml

Pellet looked bigger and appeared to contain more cells than 3 E6. When checked under microscope there were lot of tumor cell aggregates/clumps which may have under estimated cell count

A) Drug treatment for IF in 384-well plate:

384 wells x 20 µl = 7680 µl

Leave outer wells empty = in total plate 308 wells

prepare the mix for 384 wells 300 cells/µl = 2.3E6 cells

→ make 4 x of 920 µl omegel plus cells mixture in a tube and 1000 ul medium in a reservoir

→ 300 cells/µl = 5.7 E5

volume to take from cell suspension: 192 µl

ORG full medium → 594 µl

ome-gel → 130 µl

aprotinin → 3 µl

thrombin → 3 µl

fibrinogen → 18.4 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 25 µl medium

→ Next day add drugs using Tecan drug dispenser

NOTE: Left out Omegel + cells mixture from the last reservoir was plated into 48 wells as 40ul/well*17 wells

B). Flow cytometry / Single cell sequencing of the cultured (control sample)

Single-cell sequencing (18 drops):

48-well plate

18 wells x 40 µl x = 720 µl → round up to 750 uL

300 cells/µl = 1.5E6

→ make 2 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 750 µl

→ 300 cells/µl = 0.75 E6/tube

ORG full medium → 498.2 µl

cells → 126 µl

ome-gel      → 106 µl

aprotinin     → 2.5 µl

thrombin    → 2.3 µl

fibrinogen  → 15 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 350 uL medium

C) Sample for flow

→ Collect 0.5. e6 cells for flow cytometry for antibody stain for functional marker analysis in immune cells

Aditi Sirsikar performed flow cytometry staining

F) Remaining cells were frozen in stem cell banker *1 vial

End point: Day 7 ( day 6 treatment)

On day 7 of the culture onset, cells were processed for flow cytometry and single cell sequencing of control samples. Cells from 384 well plate were also stained with live/dye followed by fixing in 4% PFA according to the protocok

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
